name: angular
appliesWhen: preferredStack matches /angular/i OR T-000-discovery locks Angular as primary frontend

officialRepos.name: angular/angular
officialRepos.why: Official Angular framework source: signals, control flow, standalone APIs.

officialRepos.name: angular/components
officialRepos.why: Angular Material + CDK; reference for accessible, OnPush standalone components.

officialRepos.name: ngrx/platform
officialRepos.why: NgRx SignalStore for structured signal-based state management.

officialRepos.name: analogjs/analog
officialRepos.why: Modern Vite/SSR meta-framework for Angular with current standalone patterns.

officialRepos.name: testing-library/angular-testing-library
officialRepos.why: Behavior-focused component testing aligned with modern Angular.
